channel.title: Middlegame Memo
channel.description: Fresh takes for adult chess improvers.

item.title: "endgame fundamentals" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about endgame fundamentals through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your study plans questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the study plans questions adult chess improvers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The state of Openings in 2026
item.description: A field report on openings: where things stand, and what adult chess improvers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Tactics without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to tactics for adult chess improvers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "adult chess improvement plan" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "adult chess improvement plan" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why adult chess improvers are rethinking Endgames
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how adult chess improvers approach endgames — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Study Plans on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in study plans — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Tactics: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping tactics for adult chess improvers.
